intro: When the marshes glow in golden light and the cicadas tune their twilight orchestra, one tiny Yorkie lifts her voice to the heavens and declares the Lowcountry alive with song! Honey Bear twirls at sunrise, paws wide, heart soaring with every drifting note of pollen and possibility. Bootsie Belle, ever the practical soprano of reason, offers harmony in the form of dry wit and perfectly timed side-eye. And when Mom steps onto the scene, coffee in hand, the chorus swells into a full-fledged Summerville serenade. From moss-draped hills to cozy living rooms humming with contented purrs, this is a tale of music, mischief, and the undeniable rhythm of Southern life. Some hear allergies, others hear destiny. Either way, the hills are definitely singing. 🐾✨

title: 🐾 Origin Story: Honey Bear! 🐾
intro: From the heart of Indiana to the charm of South Carolina, this is the true beginning of our little Yorkie being transplanted from the North to the South. Originally named Libby at breeder Posh Puppies Indiana, this tiny teddy-bear-cut Yorkie made the long drive down and straight into our arms, and our hearts. With her round fluffy cheeks and bright hopeful eyes, she didn’t just arrive, she found a place where she belonged! A week after the arrival of the tuxedo kitten Bootsie Belle, these two met for the first time. Trust took time. Paw by paw, they learned each other’s rhythms, and are now inseparable as the Sistersof Summerville. They play, chase and love each other in ways only sisters understand! 🐱💛🐶

title: 🐾 Origin Story: Bootsie Belle! 🐾
intro: The origin of Bootsie Bell is really quite a tale! Adopted from Dorchester Paws in April of 2021, a tiny one pound kitten named Pearl came to her forever home at Pine Forest Country Club in Summerville, SC. Little did we know that she would disappear in the first 5 minutes! 💕 She hid well, climbing up into a wicker basket and then into the drawer of our coffee table in the living room. We had just moved into this open concept house, which makes sound travel everywhere. So her lil “Meows” didn’t help us pinpoint her location. For five full hours, we tore the house apart…flipping furniture, ripping open the couch lining, emptying drawers…searching for a kitten the size of a paperback novel. Just when panic peaked and hope thinned, the Summerville Fire Department showed up at the front door. And that’s when our tiny sovereign finally revealed herself. She poked her head out of the drawer where she had been hiding in a back corner. I guess a few cute firemen was just what this lil cat needed! We added a bell to her collar and renamed her Bootsie Belle as a reminder of that day with this lil Southern Belle with her white boots. 🚒🔥 Our family drama would continue just a week later with the arrival of the Yorkie Honey Bear to complete the Sisters of Summerville family.

title: 🌙🐾 Now I Lay Me Down to Sleep! 🐾🌙
tags: Now I Lay Me Down To Sleep
intro: Remembering back to those early days when there were two tiny sisters learning to say their bedtime prayers. They kneel down, whisper apologies for the day’s chaos, promise to be good tomorrow, and maybe request a treat or two. It’s sweet, a little mischievous, and pure early-days magic. Because every legend starts small.

title: 🛫🐾 Top Pet! 🐾🛫
intro: Top Pet is the highest school of backyard aerial combat. Its mission is to sharpen reflexes, master mid-air interceptions, and settle, once and for all, whether speed or style rules the sky. Strap in, Summerville as the backyard just went supersonic! Only two will graduate…and both will insist they carried the mission! 🎖

title: 🐾🤧 Sick Days 🤧🐾
intro: When Mom and Dad come down with colds, the whole house feels it. Tissues pile up, soup steams, rain taps the window. But in this heartfelt episode of Sick Days, the tables quietly turn as Big Brother helps out with warm bowls of chicken noodle soup, while Honey Bear snuggles close, and Bootsie Belle stands watch like a silent guardian of the living room. Because when their people aren’t feeling their best, these girls don’t miss a beat. It’s tender. It’s cozy. It’s a reminder that love has instincts of its own. And in this house, love never calls in sick. ❤️

title: 🐾💥 No Roughhousing! 💥🐾
intro: Sunlight hits the hardwood, the zoomies activate, and Summerville braces for impact as Honey Bear brings the horsepower and Bootsie Belle brings the brainpower. Honey Bear charges in with full Yorkie horsepower with her pretty lil pink bow flying, paws pumping, and pure joyful chaos. Meanwhile, Bootsie Belle calculates angles, adjusts trajectory, and executes evasive maneuvers like a tuxedo-clad strategist with a PhD in domestic domination. Only the “Voice of Mom” can bring peace as she proclaims who really rules this house. 👑

title: 🐾🏴‍☠️ Thar Be Pirates! 🏴‍☠️🐾
intro: Avast, landlubbers! A mighty pirate ship cat tree docks upon the living room wall and suddenly the winds of imagination fill the sails! Bootsie Belle rises as fierce Cat-lypso, Keeper o’ the Laser Pointer Moon and Ruler o’ the Tide o’ Treats! Honey Bear dons her tricorn as Cap’n Jane Sparrow, commander o’ blankies and kibble cannons. Hershey stands rugged at the ready, Spot charts the course, Gumbo listens to the timbers, and Oh Yeah charges forth like a cannon blast! Steel clashes! Lanterns glow! Mutiny and mischief sweep the hardwood deck as tails swish for glory an’ biscuits! But when the moon climbs high and the crew drifts to sleep, the battle fades to dream mist. Still once a pirate ship docks in yer living room, the seas are never truly calm again.

title: 🍿 🚗 Drive-In Theatre 🚗🍿
intro: Step into a night where stories glow under open skies. The Sisters experience the magic of one of South Carolina’s three remaining old-school drive-ins in Greenwood, Monetta, and Beaufort…where three giant outdoor screens play different movies at the same time under one shared sky. Gentle rolling hills make every parking spot a great view, whether you relax inside your car with the windows down or sit outside under the stars. The snack bar stays buzzing with popcorn, candy, and cold drinks, served by the kind of friendly staff that makes the whole place feel like home. As the sun sets and the movies begin, the lot grows quiet and the night feels cozy, simple, and full of classic drive-in charm.

title: 🍃🐾 Chasing Leaves 🐾🍃
intro: When Honey Bear spots a drifting oak leaf, she doesn’t see foliage, she sees a flying squirrel, a runaway dragon, and eventually a daring Lizard Fish escaping the “sea of grass!” And then this fearless Yorkie launches into full bunny-mode flight. Bootsie Belle observes the chaos with scientific precision and feline wit. To Honey Bear, the wind writes mythology. To Bootsie, imagination may swim, but instinct still pounces. 🐟🦎

title: 🌟🐾 Best Day Yet! 🐾🌟
intro: Some days aren’t about grand adventures, they’re about the quiet victories. A snack that didn’t require negotiations. A pillow that remained gloriously undisturbed. A full day where nothing weird, chaotic, or suspiciously dramatic happened. And honestly sometimes that’s exactly what makes a day perfect. Honey Bear and Bootsie Belle discover that “The Best Day Yet” can mean very different things depending on who you ask. From joyful snack triumphs to the sacred art of uninterrupted rest, the Sisters remind us that happiness often lives in the smallest, coziest moments. Because sometimes the best days aren’t loud…they’re peaceful and exactly as they should be. 💖

title: 💖🌙 Be My Valentine? 🌙💖
intro: Leather tux. Classic tux. Corsages chosen with care…and two brave hearts ready to ask the question. Biker Pup Hershey turns to Honey Bear. Spot the Hairless Cat faces Bootsie Belle. “Will you be my Valentine?” From a pet-friendly limo ride to a glowing sunset stroll through Azalea Gardens, this night is all about charm, courage, and Lowcountry romance under the lights. Because sometimes the sweetest adventures begin with those simple words.

title: 💘🌹 Valentine’s Eve Protocol! 🌹💘
intro: Hershey the Biker Pup initiates Valentine’s Eve Protocol with military precision, leather-clad confidence, and a motorcycle that absolutely does not have cupholders…all in preparation for the most important date of the year taking Honey Bear out on Valentine’s Day. Along for the ride is Spot the Hairless Cat, who’s skeptical, stylish, and suddenly confronted with a very uncomfortable truth about formalwear. Together, they plan the perfect Valentine’s surprises for the Sisters of Summerville with nothing left to chance. From heartfelt florals at The Blossom Shop 🌸 to making sure Spot looks dashing enough to escort a Tuxedo Cat like Bootsie Belle, this mission proves that love isn’t just about feelings, it’s about planning, sacrifice, and occasionally wearing a tuxedo you didn’t ask for. 🌹❤️💐

title: 💥 Whole Lotta Shakin’ 💥
intro: When the ground rumbles, you can panic…or you can learn. And around here, the Sisters choose curiosity every time. After three small tremors shook the Summerville area this past week, Honey Bear and Bootsie Belle did what any responsible Yorkie and tuxedo cat would do, they danced a little, asked big questions, and headed straight for history. Because while we don’t have a crystal ball to predict the future, we do have the past to guide us. Their journey led them to the fascinating exhibit at the Summerville-Dorchester Museum, where they discovered the powerful story of the 1886 Lowcountry Earthquake, a reminder that even the calmest ground has a history beneath it. From fault lines to “Earth stretch marks,” this episode blends science, local history, and just a touch of dance-floor optimism. Want to explore it for yourself? Stop by the museum at 100 E. Doty Avenue, Summerville, SC and see how the Lowcountry’s past still shapes the present.

title: 📚🐾 Historic Kitty 🐾📚
intro: Bootsie Belle visits the Timrod Library to discover the remarkable true story of Catherine “Kitty” Smith Springs…a “Kitty” whose legacy still shapes Summerville today. As Bootsie learns about this trailblazing woman of color from the town’s earliest days, she feels an unexpected kinship rooted in kindness, courage, and community. 🐾 🪡 Known for her beautiful dressmaking and custom hats (once sold by wagon!), Kitty Springs rose to become an astute businesswoman and property owner in 19th-century Summerville. But her greatest legacy was generosity. She donated her wealth to help build schools, mission churches, and medical facilities for the underprivileged, especially people of color and the multi-racial poor of the Lowcountry. One of her most lasting gifts was land and support for St. Barnabas Mission, which served as a day school, public health center, and mission church. Today, that bright red-trimmed chapel lives on as Bishop Pengelley Memorial Chapel, a symbol that things like welcome, compassion, and service never go out of style. Through history, hats, and heartfelt moments, the Sisters learn that remembering kindness is one of the most important lessons of all. 🐱🐶

title: 🎉🎂 Bootsie Belle’s 5th Birthday! 🎂🎉
intro: Today, the spotlight shines on Bootsie Belle, the ever-composed tuxedo cat who just turned five years old…yes, this Southern Belle is one whole day younger than her sister Honey Bear, and she will remind you of that fact with grace, poise, and a perfectly level stare. Mom wanted to make the day extra special, so she ordered a BlueMountain e-card, the kind that comes with music, sparkle, and a surprise message delivered by the Queen of Country Music herself, only Mom didn’t expect it to arrive with a little personal touch. One truth rings clear: Southern Belles gotta stick together! 💖🎶 🎤

title: 🎈🎂 Honey Bear’s 5th Birthday! 🎂🎈
intro: Today Honey Bear turns 5 years old! 🥳 Dad just wanted to send Honey Bear a sweet, silly digital greeting delivered by Weird Al Yankovic himself in a Blue Mountain eCard. Simple, right? Wrong. Because when Weird Al delivers, sometimes does the unexpected! The Sisters of Summerville living room becomes a legendary jam session! 🎶🪗 🎉

title: 🏈🔥 Unnecessary Roughness 🔥🏈
intro: In a fantasy version of the Super Bowl LX gridiron showdown, Honey Bear and Bootsie Belle suit up on opposing sides of the biggest game in football. The turf shakes. The crowd roars. The rivalry gets personal. What starts as playful competition quickly escalates into bone-crunching tackles, flying fur, and one hit too many. From epic face-offs at the line of scrimmage to airborne collisions frozen in slow motion, and that ultimate penalty call that brings the game to a screeching halt. Big Brother as the Referee drops the dreaded call of “Unnecessary Roughness” while Mom and Dad issue penalties from the sidelines proving once and for all that no championship, not even the Super Bowl, outranks family rules! Because in Summerville, even legends can get grounded. 🐾🏈😼

title: 👻 Ghost Pouncer 👻
intro: When the house goes quiet and the air starts to shimmer, Bootsie Belle goes to work. Some spirits don’t cross over quietly. As Mom stays calm and Big Brother grows suspicious, Honey Bear offers helpful commentary. Humans see nothing at all, but cats see everything…and Bootsie is not afraid to pounce on ghosts with unfinished business. This family is protected by a four-legged paranormal security system!😾✨

title: 🐾🌙 Yorkie Gremlin 🧀😬
intro: Big Sister comes to visit all the way from Oregon and everything is perfectly normal until a late-night snack happens. You see nobody told her the most important house rule: “Never feed Honey Bear after midnight!” One tiny piece of cheese later and Honey Bear starts going full Yorkie Gremlin with claws, mischief, chaos, and two very worried Sisters hiding for cover. But when the sun rises, everything is normal again…or is it? 😈🌞

title: 🎸🌙 Hound Dog 🌙🎸
intro: While Summerville is trying to sleep, Gumbo the Howling Hound Dog has other plans. Enter Hershey, the smooth biker pup with an acoustic guitar and some unmistakable Elvis-inspired swagger. Hershey’s singing ‘n strumming was meant to put Gumbo on report, but instead has a lullaby effect on the hound. The music has quite a different type of effect on Honey Bear and Bootsie Belle, who swoon like teenage girls at a 1950s Elvis concert. Summerville finally gets some peace as music soothes the savage beast! 💤🎶

title: 🐾 SuperPet CosPlay 🐾
intro: Summerville gets a little super tonight…and a lot sillier as playtime turns heroic with Bootsie Belle transforming into SpiderCat and Honey Bear becoming BatDog. The Sisters suit up for an epic round of SuperPet CosPlay! But every hero needs a villain and Spot the Hairless Cat is more than happy to play the part, armed with squeaky toys, dramatic monologues, and a plan that almost works…until one very fishy weakness is revealed. Because in Summerville, even CosPlay villains are really just friends who love a bit of imagination, attention, and snacks! 🐟🥫

title: ❄️🌱 Operation Groundhog 🌱❄️
intro: Honey Bear had a brilliant plan with a little spy gear, tech wizardry, and spring would arrive early for everyone, but Bootsie Belle wasn’t buying it. Some things are best left to Mother Nature, and one very official groundhog in a tiny top hat. When secrets unravel and the plug gets pulled, Punxsutawney Phil has the final say…and winter isn’t quite ready to leave yet! 🐿️❄️🎩

title: 🐾 Obedience Collars 🐾
intro: When Dad goes out of town, chaos quietly sharpens its claws with these two Sisters. Mom spots an ad on social media for a too-good-to-be-true AI powered obedience training promising 100% obedience for both cats and dogs. So what could possibly go wrong? Guess that’s the last time Dad travels without backup! 😅⚡

title: ❄️ Snowball Fight ❄️
intro: A light snowfall turns suspicious…then hostile! When Honey Bear bravely investigates the mysterious cold ground, Bootsie Belle reveals herself as a highly trained snow ambush specialist. What follows is a full-scale, wildly inaccurate snowball war complete with dramatic declarations, expert mockery, and zero confirmed hits. But as always, chaos melts into comfort…because even when they fight like cats and dogs, they love like sisters. 🩷☃️

title: 🕶️ PIB – Pets in Black 🕶️
intro: When strange things start glowing in the neighborhood and reality feels a little off, it’s time to call in the pros. Honey Bear and Bootsie Belle suit up as Agent Bark and Agent Meow to protect Summerville from the weird, the cosmic, and the completely unexpected. This episode is a loving homage to one of the Sisters’ favorite intergalactic duos, packed with neuralizers, deadpan sass, and the kind of neighborhood mystery that’s definitely not indigestion…or is it? Some secrets are out of this world… and some are better forgotten. 😎👽

title: 🎭 Musical Tryouts 🎭
intro: The spotlight is on, the vines are twitching, and things are getting dramatically leafy…as Honey Bear and Bootsie Belle head to auditions at the Flower Town Players Community Theatre in Summerville, South Carolina, hoping to land roles in the musical “Little Shop of Horrors.” Honey Bear brings her sweet, wide-eyed sincerity as Seymour, while Bootsie Belle…well…proves she has a hidden talent for being absolutely terrifying. From starry-eyed dreams of cast parties to suspiciously ambitious plants, this episode blends local theater love, musical mayhem, and classic Sisters of Summerville humor…with just a hint of world domination. 😼🌿 🎶 Feed me applause. 🎭 Feed me drama. 🌱 Feed me…show-stopping performances.

title: 🌳 Angel Oak 🌳
intro: In this new episode, Honey Bear and Bootsie Belle visit the legendary Angel Oak, one of the oldest and most breathtaking trees in the Charleston area of South Carolina. From an epic first glimpse beneath its twisting branches to Bootsie’s very official museum-style rules, the Sisters learn that some wonders are best admired with respect, patience…and sensible shoes. It’s a gentle mix of awe, humor, and Southern charm, reminding us that ancient beauty deserves a little distance and a lot of appreciation. 😺🐶

title: 🐾 Indiana Bones: Search for the Lost Bark 🐾
intro: When Honey Bear loses her bark, it’s time to embark on an epic adventure! The comic duo set off on a daring expedition to the lost city of CatManDo, armed with courage, a fedora, and a trusty whip. Her clever guide Bootsie Belle leads the way across rickety bridges, glowing chasms, ancient traps, and one very suspicious rolling boulder…proving once again that when things get hairy, you always trust the cat. Adventure, laughs, and sibling chaos await in this action-packed episode of Sisters of Summerville! 🎬

title: ⚓🐾 USS Yorktown 🐾⚓
intro: This week, the Sisters set paw on history…literally. During a visit to Patriots Point in Mount Pleasant, South Carolina, our two Sisters Honey Bear and Bootsie Belle explore the legendary USS Yorktown, docked proudly on Charleston Harbor. What starts as curiosity turns into imagination, as Honey Bear dreams of captaining an aircraft carrier and Bootsie Belle takes to the skies in a WWII F6F Hellcat. With humor, heart, and just the right amount of sass, the Sisters reflect on the courage, responsibility, and sacrifice behind naval service…and gain a new appreciation for the steel giants that helped defend freedom. History, imagination, and whiskered wisdom collide…SoS style 🇺🇸✈️⚓.

title: 🧪🐾 SiCK KiTTY 🐾🧪
intro: When Spot the Hairless Cat starts feeling under the weather, the house shifts into full comfort mode. Honey Bear worries, Bootsie Belle diagnoses, and soon the whole crew gathers for a very familiar lullaby made famous by The Big Bang Theory. Well it turns out friendship, music, and a little nerdy tradition have restorative palindrome powers…soothing the soul. Whether you’re a scientist, a sitcom fan, or a sick kitty wrapped in blankets, sometimes healing isn’t medicine at all. It’s friends who show up and sing anyway. 💛🐱

title: ❄️🐾 Snowy Paws Drama 🐾❄️
intro: A wintery storm is sweeping across many areas…blanketing the ground in cold, white fluff. For most, it’s just snow. For one very small Yorkie, it’s clearly the beginning of the end. Watch as Honey Bear bravely questions reality, negotiates with winter, and ultimately proves that boots, coats, and moral support from Mom can make even the coldest day survivable…while Bootsie Belle observes it all with trademark judgment.

title: ✂️🐾 Hair Salon Day 🐾✂️
intro: What starts as a simple cleanup quickly drifts into deeper waters as Honey Bear faces the curlers with her confidence on the line. Meanwhile Bootsie Belle channels unmistakable Calypso energy straight out of the Pirates of the Caribbean. Island vibes, bold choices, and a little salon magic collide to leave one big question floating in the air, “How long can they keep these looks going?” 🌴😼

title: 🕶️ PetSabers 🕶️
intro: What happens when a cozy living room turns into a virtual arena? Honey Bear, Bootsie Belle, Biker Pup Hershey, and Gumbo the Howler strap on VR headsets to discover reality is optional when the light sabers come out. From fearless confidence to instant regret, this crew learns that virtual fun still comes with very real reactions, and a few opinions about gravity. 😄🐾

title: 🧬🐾 Make My Clone 🐾🧬
intro: Today’s episode is inspired by Anik Singal of Ugentic AI and his MakeMyClone Challenge, which I’ve been taking this week. As I learn how to clone myself, my dog and cat sit nearby listening and learning things to put to use later while I sleep. What happens when one curious click turns the living room into a full-blown cloning zone? Bootsie Belle multiplies the sass, Honey Bear bends the laws of physics (and dog bones 🦴), and a very familiar “AI Guy” drops in to remind us that cloning isn’t the problem…not using it wisely is.

title: 🏡 Around the Bend 🚗
intro: Honey Bear and Bootsie Belle watch what happens when someone ignores traffic signs and barrels through a tight corner. The result is dramatic, expensive, and entirely preventable. Our neighborhood streets aren’t shortcuts or speed tracks, they’re where people live. “Around the Bend” is a reminder that driving responsibly matters most when no one is watching. Slowing down, following the law, and setting a good example keeps everyone safe, and says a lot about who we are.⚠️🐾

title: 🧸 Teddy Rumpelstiltskin 🧸
intro: What happens when curiosity opens the wrong closet…and a very old teddy bear wakes up? Honey Bear and Bootsie Belle find themselves wondering whether this glowing-eyed guest is sweet or sinister…as they try their best not to judge a book by its cover. Luckily the Biker Pup Hershey has lived long enough to know a universal truth of the universe…some things are better left in boxes! 😎🐾

title: 💛 Quiet Courage 💛
intro: Thunder rolls, nerves shake, and one little Yorkie dives for cover! It’s a moment every small-dog parent knows all too well. Instead of feeding that fear, Mom and Dad choose a different path…one rooted in calm, presence, and a powerful lesson from history. Honey Bear learns that fear is natural, but silence can be scarier than speaking up. Inspired by the wisdom of Martin Luther King, Jr., this gentle moment reminds us that courage isn’t the absence of fear, it’s choosing what matters in spite of fear. And sometimes, courage looks like scooting a little closer to your sister…because even when the world feels loud, we’re braver together. 🐶🐱

title: 📖🐾 Gullah Geechee 🐾📖
intro: The Sisters of Summerville take a moment for a quiet, heartfelt tribute to the Gullah Geechee people…a culture rooted in the Lowcountry that has endured through voice, care, and community. From shared meals to shared stories, Honey Bear and Bootsie Belle reflect on how heritage isn’t always written down. It’s remembered, passed on, and listened to. No lectures. No labels. Just respect, continuity, and dignity. Pull up a porch chair and take a moment with the Sisters as they listen to history still speaking. 🐶🐱

title: 👻 Ghost Tour Rejects 👻
intro: The Sisters take on a Charleston ghost tour, but the spirits aren’t exactly thrilled. Bootsie Belle treats the haunting like a photo shoot, while Honey Bear keeps asking about snacks and the ghosts decide this is not what they signed up for. Even the afterlife has its limits…but selfies are eternal.🧀👀

title: 🐾 Applied Paw-tificial Intelligence 🐾
intro: What happens when Applied Generative AI meets paws, whiskers, and a very opinionated cat? Today’s episode features Marcia R. Sweet of Purdue University who sat down with Dad, Honey Bear, and Bootsie Belle to talk about Dad’s experience in Purdue Online’s Applied Generative AI course, and how the Sisters of Summerville comic strip is helping him as a real-world AI test lab. From learning how AI actually works (not just pushing buttons) to a future goal of comic creation that’s fun and easy for everyone! 🐶🐱

title: 🏁🐾 Fast and the Furriest! 🐾🏁
intro: Honey Bear and Bootsie Belle sometimes chase each like it’s the “Indy 500” with zoomies, tails chasing, trash talking, and throwing paws like they’re racing for a trophy made of treats. But after the dust settles, they’re still two loving sisters! ❤️

title: 🎣🐾 Lowcountry Gator 🐊🐢
intro: In the Lowcountry, turtles have a special talent. They float up like they pay property taxes and the second they blink, somebody hollers “GATOR!” like it’s an emergency broadcast! Fishermen are famous for their tall tales…and yelling “GATOR!” is definitely one of the classics especially when the “gator” turns out to be Maggie Jean, a turtle who’s sweet as tea, calm as Sunday, and absolutely minding her own business 🐢✨

title: 🐾 People Owners Association 🐾
intro: Honey Bear calls an emergency POA meeting (that’s People Owners Association) to stop the humans from “reorganizing” everyone’s stuff… and to establish two sacred rights: snacks and admiration. But the second the humans mention a walk, the entire council collapses instantly and the meeting is adjourned!🚶‍♂️😂

title: ☔ Barking in the Rain 🌧️
intro: Teddy Bear Yorkie Honey Bear gets wet behind the ears turning a backyard downpour into a full-on Gene Kelly-style moment with barking, singing, and puddle-splashing like she was born for the spotlight. And when Biker Pup Hershey and Gumbo the Howler jump in with raincoats, umbrellas, and big “A-WOOOOO!” energy, it becomes a musical nobody asked for…and let’s just say Bootsie Belle is less than amused. 😼😂

title: 🦎 Gotcha Nose! 🐾 😼
intro: Sometimes real life writes the best punchlines! Today’s episode “Gotcha Nose!” is based upon a true Bootsie Belle moment, when curiosity met consequences on the back porch. Turns out, you really do have to be careful who you corner, especially when they have excellent aim and sticky little toes. 😬😂

title: 🌿💚 Green with Envy 💚🌿
intro: Love is in the Lowcountry air…but so is a little jealousy. When biker pup Hershey pulls out his ukulele and serenades Bootsie Belle beneath the moonlight, sparks fly in all the wrong directions. Honey Bear thought she was going to be his girl. Romance, rivalry, and classic sisterly side-eye collide in today’s episode of the Sisters of Summerville. 🎶🐾🐱

title: 🧸🐾 Toy Story 🐾🧸
intro: My Yorkie Honey Bear loves her squeaky toys. Some dogs try to eat them while others are clearly on a noble mission to free the squeaker. Today Honey Bear discovers what happens when her squeaky victims get their final revenge…in this pet-unfriendly, Stephen King-style nightmare that’s equal parts funny and unsettling. Spoiler alert: the squeaky toys fight back. 😳

title: 🐾 Gumbo the Hound Dog Howler! 🐾
intro: Meet Gumbo, a hound dog who alternates between napping in the shade and announcing his presence to the entire Lowcountry. Honey Bear thinks they’ve made a new friend, but Bootsie Belle suspects they’ve made a lifelong noise problem. Gumbo…just howls…then goes back to sleep. Some neighbors bring casseroles, while others bring chaos! 💕😼 😴

title: 📖🕷️ Little Miss Belle 🕷️📖
intro: Today is a fairy-tale prank straight out of a nursery rhyme, with a Summerville twist. Bootsie Belle is minding her own business in the sunshine when a very suspicious spider appears. Swipe, miss, swipe again…the bug is too quick. While her teddy bear yorkie sister Honey Bear is up to Hijinx, Little Miss Belle reminds us that sisters don’t scare sisters out of fear…they do it for fun. 😼🌼🐶

title: 🎁🏡 The Welcome Wagon 🐾😼 🧺
intro: Honey Bear and Bootsie Belle roll up with a proper Pine Forest house-warming basket for their new neighbor *Hershey*. Honey Bear is instantly smitten (weak knees included), while Bootsie’s running a full background check like she’s neighborhood security. Will Hershey prove he’s just a friendly new pup or is Bootsie right to keep one eye open? 🕵️‍♀️ 👀

title: 🐾 Here Comes Hershey 🚚
intro: A moving truck rolls into Pine Forest and Bootsie Belle instantly senses trouble…and then a “VRROOOOM!” makes Honey Bear’s pink bow practically launch into orbit. Stepping onto the scene is their new neighbor *Hershey* complete with leather jacket, doggles, and that “heart throb” Yorkie smile!

title: 🕵️‍♀️ Mystery of the Vanishing Treats 🕵️‍♀️
intro: After reading one too many Sherlock Holmes mysteries, Bootsie Belle goes into “genius sleuth mode” when the treat jar turns up empty. Honey Bear proudly volunteers as her clueless sidekick with a notebook full of “clues” but in true Summerville fashion, the case takes a twist, and the truth is way closer than anyone wants to admit.🐾

title: 🌕🐾 Howling @ Wolf Moon 🐾🌕
intro: Today the sky over Summerville is serving up a full moon so big and bright…and Spot the Hairless Cat rolls in from Ridgeville with a spooky-cool legend. A long time ago, in the cold of winter, folks swore they heard wolves howling more often around January’s full moon…so the name stuck for Wolf Moon. Honey Bear is instantly impressed (and a little nervous) while Bootsie Belle is instantly suspicious (and a lot sarcastic)🚨🐺

title: ❄️🌴 Pine Forest Polar Plunge! 🥶🎉
intro: Honey Bear charges into the Pine Forest New Year’s Polar Plunge like it’s a spa day…splashingly bold and loving every second. Meanwhile Bootsie Belle isn’t sure the water temperature is to her liking!🌡️😼

title: 🎉🐾 New Year Resolutions 🐾🎉
intro: Honey Bear is coming in hot with “New year…new me!” energy. And Bootsie Belle, well she is fully committed to her own wellness journey of quiet judgment and strategic naps. Together they’ve officially launched a 30-Day Resolution Tryout at Paw-n-Fitness, because let’s be honest, everybody’s motivated on Day 1. The real

title: 🐾 Home Alone 🐾
intro: With Mom and Dad headed out to celebrate, Honey Bear is absolutely convinced this is her moment to shine, but she has been watching Kevin McCallister way too much! From hallway victory laps to ice-cream-powered poor decisions, the girls take one tiny checklist mistake and turn it into a full-scale New Year’s adventure, complete with consequences! 🎊😴

title: ✨ Midnight Challenge ✨
intro: 🕰️ December 30th brings big plans and even bigger bravado as Honey Bear and Bootsie Belle challenge each other to stay up till midnight as practice for New Year’s Eve. Confidence is high, eyelids are heavy, and the struggle is real. So who will win the Midnight Challenge? 🐾😴

title: 🐾 Fireworks 💙
intro: For Honey Bear, fireworks aren’t fun or festive. When the explosions start, fear takes over with shaking paws, racing heart, memories she can’t escape. And she’s not alone. Many dogs and many veterans living with PTSD experience the very same thing. Those booming “wonders in the sky” can reopen painful memories and make nights (and sometimes entire days while they are going off) incredibly hard. This episode is a reminder to lead with compassion. If you’re celebrating, please remember families, pets, and people nearby who are struggling. Limiting fireworks to a few hours and being mindful of others truly makes a difference. 🐶 💛 🐱

title: ✨ Mom’s Night Off 🍕
intro: 🐶🐱 Mom needed a well-earned night off after all that cooking. Honey Bear proudly orders pizza delivery, only to discover her trusty plastic Princess Phone isn’t exactly connected to the real world. But when Dad calls out, “Who wants treats?”…does he mean dog treats? Cat treats? Or pizza? One thing’s certain… chaos is always on the menu in Summerville.📞🍕

title: 🧡🐾 The Princess Honey Bear 🐾🧡
intro: 🏰⚔️👑 Honey Bear and Bootsie Belle go full cosplay in a playful homage to director Rob Reiner’s classic tale “The Princess Bride.” They’re just two sisters enjoying their Christmas gifts until the “duel” gets a little too convincing and the sass level hits INCONCEIVABLE proportions with the kind of hijinx only these two can deliver. 😹🐶💥

title: 🎄 Bring Back Christmas 🎄,
intro: It’s the day after Christmas and Bootsie Belle’s gears start turning as she decides the only logical solution is to build a Babbage-style Time Machine to rewind the calendar back to Christmas Day. Tiny problem…apparently all Christmas Magic requires Santa approval…and Santa is on VACATION! 🏖️🎅😂

title: 🎄 Christmas Morning Chaos 🎄
intro: 🎁 It’s Christmas morning in Summerville and calm was never an option for Honey Bear and Bootsie Belle! From enthusiastic unwrapping to ribbon-related incidents and towering mountains of wrapping paper, Summerville’s Sisters discover that the true magic of Christmas Morning is chaos, laughter, and sticking together. Follow along as the girls remind us that the best holiday moments aren’t perfect — they’re shared. 💕🐾

title: 🎅🎄 Stow-a-Ways 🎄🎅
intro: When Honey Bear and Bootsie Belle accidentally hitch a ride in Santa’s sleigh, Christmas delivery turns into a high-flying holiday scramble! The Sisters of Summerville wish you and yours a very Merry Christmas filled with joy, laughter, and just the right amount of festive sass ‘n chaos! ❤️ 🐾

title: 🎄 White Christmas ❄️✨
intro: The Sisters may share a home, but they come from very different worlds. Honey Bear is a northern gal…replanted in the South from Indiana as a young pup. She’s convinced Christmas isn’t complete without snow, snow, SNOW! 🐶❄️ And Bootsie Belle is a Dorchester Paws rescue…a true Southern-born gal who prefers sunglasses, sunshine, and poolside vibes over frozen toes and shoveling. 😎

title: 🎭💙 Sisters...Sisters 💙🎭
intro: Honey Bear and Bootsie Belle are going full diva in their blue dresses and feather fans, in this sassy little wink to the legendary Haynes Sisters from the holiday classic “White Christmas!” This duet sung to the Rosemary Clooney song helped inspire the Sisters of Summerville vibe in the first place. Expect sparkle, sisterly side-eye, and the kind of teamwork that only happens when treats are involved!🎶❄️

title: ✨🎄 Lowcountry Holiday Lights 🎄✨
intro: Honey Bear and Bootsie Belle take a cozy night cruise through the Lowcountry, soaking in holiday lights, glowing arches, twinkling trees, and the quiet magic of a live nativity. From wide-eyed wonder to peaceful stillness, the lights fade, the car hums home, and two sisters end the night exactly where they belong…together. May your days be bright, your hearts be full, and your season be wrapped in warmth, wonder, and love. Wishing everyone a Joyous and Blessed Holiday Season! 🎄 💖

title: 😼 Whine & Licker! 🐶
intro: Our tuxedo cat Bootsie Belle is the most talkative cat in the world…she loves a good whine! And our sweet pup Honey Bear? She can’t stop licking. Anything. Ever. So today’s episode is a playful, family-friendly take on that very Summerville truth…a little sass, a little slobber, and a whole lot of Sisters energy 💕

title: 🧺 Sweetgrass Basket for Mom 🧺
intro: Honey Bear and Bootsie Belle discover that some gifts carry stories. After learning about the Gullah Geechee people of the Lowcountry (descendants of West Africans who preserved their culture through language, art, and tradition), the girls are inspired by the care, patience, and love woven into sweetgrass basketry right here in the Charleston area. This episode is about more than a Christmas present. It’s about honoring history, supporting local artisans, and recognizing the beauty of a craft passed down through generations. Follow along as the Sisters learn that the most meaningful gifts are the ones made with heart…and heritage. ❤️

title: 🚂 The Summerville Express 🚂
intro: All aboard…a mysterious holiday train rolls into Historic Summerville, bringing fog, festive lights, and a very confident conductor with a very questionable Naughty & Nice algorithm. Turns out the list runs on vibes, not data…and Bootsie has opinions about that. Sometimes the best fix is a little reprogramming!🎄

title: 🍬🎄 Peppermint Fudge 🎄🍬
intro: Today’s episode hits *very* close to home as last night, the real-life Honey Bear managed to get into peppermint fudge and gave us a genuine scare. Thankfully, she’s **okay this morning**, but it was a powerful reminder that pets can get into trouble in the blink of an eye. They truly will do the darnedest things when you’re not looking. This episode turns that moment into a gentle, humorous story with an important takeaway… **holiday treats and pets don’t mix**. Please be especially careful to keep **milk chocolate away from pets**, as it can be poisonous, particularly for small dogs. Sometimes all you can do is stay calm… watch closely… and wait it out. 🐶🐱💗

title: 🐾🍖 Good Girls’ Treat Time! 🧀🐾
intro: All is calm, until those magical words are spoken. When Dad asks, “Who are my good girls?”, Honey Bear and Bootsie Belle transform from peaceful housemates into a full-speed, tail-wagging, paw-tapping blur of joy. Their faith in the universe is instantly restored…and it’s time to dance.🐶🐱

title: 🎄 Uggly Sweater Contest 🎄
intro: Holiday cheer has officially gone off the rails…and the sweaters did it. 🧶🎅 The Sisters are hosting an Ugly Sweater Contest, and everyone showed up very confident, possibly too confident. Now it’s your turn to decide who wins bragging rights (and eternal side-eye): 🗳️ Vote for your favorite ugly sweater: 🎁 Honey Bear … Santa sweater sweetness 🧝 Bootsie Belle … Elf sweater with maximum judgment 🦌 Spot the Hairless Cat … Reindeer sweater, zero enthusiasm 🧃 Cap’n Oh Yeah … Kool-Aid sweater, doors optional

title: 🎄📦 Holiday Shipping 📦🎄
intro: The season of joy, tape guns, and long lines has arrived! Honey Bear is full of holiday optimism, Bootsie Belle is armed with reality, and the UPS Store is standing between Christmas cheer and conveyor-belt destiny. 😼🐶 Today’s episode is a gentle reminder to check those shipping dates early, because hope is free, but holiday shipping definitely isn’t!

title: 🎄 Holiday Dress-Up… or Else 🎅
intro: Imagine some of you have tried to put holiday outfits on your pets only to find them not approving of your fashion choices! Today’s adventure looks at the differences between cats and dogs when it comes to costumes in our Summerville family. Honey Bear is living her best Santa-cosplay life…bows, fluff, and full festive glory while Bootsie Belle, would like it known that holiday costumes are a CRIME against feline dignity! Elf outfits were attempted. Chaos was achieved. Peace was negotiated… on cat terms 😴🐾

title: 🐶 The Crèche Festival 🎀
intro: Honey Bear and Bootsie Belle step into something truly special as they visit the Crèche Festival at Bethany United Methodist. From hand-crafted nativity scenes to beautiful interpretations from cultures around the world, the girls discover how one timeless story can be told in so many beautiful meaningful ways! This first ever exhibit is on display thru Sunday (12/14) from noon to 5 pm at 118 W 3rd South Street in Summerville, SC. ❤️✨ — at Bethany United Methodist Church.

title: 🎄✨ Miracle on Main Street! ✨🎄
intro: Summerville’s holiday parade just turned into a courtroom classic! Honey Bear steps into her role as Santa Paws, Bootsie Belle rises to fame as Claws Noir, and together they prove that festive fluff and feline attitude can absolutely win a legal battle. From parade cheers to a gavel-pounding verdict, this holiday special nods lovingly to a timeless Christmas favorite…with a very SoS twist. 🐾❤️

title: ⚔️🌟 Paws in Boots! 🐾😺
intro: Summerville gets a full dose of swashbuckling chaos today as Spot the Fearless leaps onto the scene with cape fluttering, sword sparkling, and melodrama cranked up to eleven. Honey Bear and Bootsie Belle try to keep up as Spot battles his greatest foe yet — a cursed garden gnome — and discovers that true heroism might just be…friendship. ❤️

title: 🎁🐾 Outlet Mall Mayhem! 🐾🎁
intro: Holiday shopping sounded festive…until Honey Bear and Bootsie Belle discovered the true meaning of “outlet exhaustion.” From wonky sweater sizes to colors that absolutely lie, the girls quickly learn that shopping is a full-body sport. Thankfully, every great adventure ends at their favorite PAWBUCKS sipping overpriced pet drinks and holding a much-needed meeting of their built-in shopping support group. ☕️💚

title: 🎄✨ Scrooge McBear Edition! ✨🐾
intro: Honey Bear takes a Dickensian detour today as “Scrooge McBear,” learning what happens when you hold your treats a little too tightly! With Bootsie Belle starring as all three spirits, the girls journey through Christmas Past, Present, and Yet to Come to discover the true joy of the holidays: sharing with the ones you love. ❤️🎁 Cue the cookies… the giggles… and a very relieved Honey Bear finding her Christmas spirit just in time! ✨🐶🐱🎄

title: 🌋⛳ Prehistoric Country Club! 🦕✨
intro: Honey Bear and Bootsie Belle thought they were heading out for a normal day on the course, but this Prehistoric Country Club has liquid on every hole…from bubbling lava to tar pits! Join the Sisters as they navigate hazards like mystery manholes, and the fiercest challenge of all…sibling teamwork. See today’s episode as these sisters take a swing back in time! 🐶🐱

title: 🐾 The Fluid AI Fiasco! 📸
intro: Turns out Dad’s new GoPro Fluid AI can track everything Honey Bear and Bootsie Belle do around the house. But will the girls figure out a way around this dubious device and is it truly “alien” technology? Catch today’s high-tech hijinks and see if the sisters can outsmart artificial intelligence yet again! 😼🕹️🐶 — with GoPro.

title: 🚗🐾 Walk or Drive? 🐶🐱
intro: When Dad heads to Firestone for a little car care, Honey Bear and Bootsie Belle are pretty sure they know what that means…more walks! But Mom sets the record straight with a dose of Summerville sass, and the pets learn that “car trouble” doesn’t always translate to “bonus adventures.” Or does it? 😉

title: 🏒 Stingrays Showdown! 🏒
intro: Honey Bear and Bootsie Belle hit the North Charleston Coliseum ice for a night of South Carolina Stingrays hockey! But leave it to the girls to turn spectating into a full-contact sport! From sneaking onto the ice to battling over nachos in the stands, Mom and Dad end up giving more penalties than the refs. Will the girls stay out of the box…or are they destined for two minutes of “excessive adorableness”? 😉 — at North Charleston Coliseum and Performing Arts Center. 😸🐶

title: 🍤🐟 A Visit from The Codfather! 🐾🚚
intro: The Codfather Nexton food truck made a tasty stop at Pine Forest Country Club, and Honey Bear instantly slipped into her best Marlon Brando like Godfather persona…presenting Bootsie with a delicious “offer” involving fried cod and golden chips. The sisters left in the best of moods from their little fish-filled adventure at the country club! 😄🐶🐱✨

title: ✨🎄 Sisters Holiday Cheer! 🎄✨
intro: Honey Bear and Bootsie Belle have officially wrangled the Christmas season into the house…one tree wobble, tinsel tornado, and angel-topper moment at a time! From our little Summerville family to yours, we wish you a season filled with joy, magic, and plenty of laughter! May your days be merry, your tree stay upright, and your holiday glow shine brighter than Honey Bear’s pink bow! 💖🐾✨

title: ⚡️ Sisters Cyborg Monday! 🤖📦
intro: Honey Bear thought she heard it was Cyborg Monday. Delivery trucks, flying drones, and one very dramatic Yorkie later, Bootsie Belle steps in to clear things up before Honey Bear declares an intergalactic emergency. If your porch looks like a shipping depot today, you’ll feel this one. 😄

title: 🌿 Celebrating Kitty Springs ✨
intro: Honey Bear and Bootsie Belle head to the Dorchester–Summerville Museum at 100 E Doty Ave, where they discover the incredible life of Catherine “Kitty” Smith Springs, a woman of color whose talent and generosity helped shape Summerville in its earliest days. From her dressmaking shop on King Street to her lasting contributions to education and community care, Kitty Springs’ story still shines. Join the girls as they explore the history that helped make Summerville!

title: 🐢 The Aquarium Recruiters! 🐾
intro: Today the girls take a field trip to the South Carolina Aquarium at 100 Aquarium Wharf in Charleston. Honey Bear thought she was just there to sightsee, but one very determined sea turtle had other plans. And Bootsie Belle turned the whole thing into a career opportunity…involving lettuce…lots of lettuce! Dive into today’s episode and see how Honey Bear almost became an employee of the sea. 😅

title: 🎄✨ Brightest Lights! ✨🎄
intro: Dad decided to out-shine the entire ZIP code this year, and Honey Bear and Bootsie Belle were right there to help out. Let’s just say the light test didn’t exactly go as planned…unless the plan involved illuminating half the county and giving Santa an unexpected detour. 😅 Bootsie Belle may or may not have achieved temporary orbit. Honey Bear claims she saw it coming. Dad pretends everything was fine. Come see how our little Summerville crew survived the brightest “oops” of the season!

title: 🦃✨ Friendsgiving! ✨🦃
intro: The girls went all in this year…digging through the costume box to celebrate Friendsgiving in full period style! Bootsie Belle as a prim little pilgrim, Honey Bear as the most enthusiastic Pocahontas pup you’ve ever seen, and Spot the Bald Cat arriving in a turkey getup so dramatic…it nearly sent everyone running! But once the feathers settled, all three came together for what matters most…sharing a warm kitchen, a good laugh, and a thankful heart. Here’s to a Thanksgiving filled with family, food, furry friends, and the joy of being together, however silly your costumes might get. Wishing y’all a cozy, love-filled Thanksgiving from our Summerville family to yours! 💛🐾

title: 📵 Internet Down 😱
intro: There are days when the cosmos aligns, the router hiccups, or cyber attacks take the net down entirely…and suddenly Honey Bear and Bootsie Belle are convinced civilization has ended. Cat videos vanish into the void, squeaky-toy reviews evaporate, and the girls go full tilt! 💛 But even a digital blackout can turn into something sweet. When the screens go dark and the family lights up, gathering around a good old-fashioned board game of Monopoly, Sisters of Summerville style! Remembering that sometimes the best connection isn’t Wi-Fi, it’s the people (and pets!) right beside you. 🐾

title: 🐾 Hollywood Feed Visit 🐾
intro: The girls paid a visit to the newly opened Hollywood Feed at 2680 Main Street, right where Summerville, Goose Creek, and Moncks Corner meet. Honey Bear trotted in proudly on her leash while Bootsie Belle held court from her stroller… instantly winning over the staff who “don’t get many cats.” Between the wall of toys, the friendly smiles, and plenty of pampering, the Sisters had themselves a perfect Lowcountry outing. 😺TWO PAWS WAY UP! 🐶

title: 🐾 Sisters visit Fort Sumter! 🐾
intro: The girls take a ride across Charleston Harbor to visit one of the Lowcountry’s most important historic sites…and naturally, they brought their own Summerville flair along for the journey. Honey Bear soaked up the stories, paws filled with excitement, while Bootsie Belle focused on what truly matters during any adventure: The Snacks! Fort Sumter might be known for the first shots of the Civil War, but today it also met two curious sisters ready to explore, learn, and add a sprinkle of Southern sass to the sea breeze.

title: 🐾 Skynet Activated! 🤖
intro: Dad’s been burning the midnight oil learning Generative AI and LLMs, but you know how it goes in this house. The moment he nods off, Honey Bear and Bootsie Belle decide they should “help.” And let’s just say, Hollywood might owe our girls an apology for all those dramatic AI takeover movies. One innocent game of ball…one unlucky keyboard bounce…and suddenly the future of civilization is in the paws of a Yorkie and a tuxedo cat. Summerville’s never been safer…or in more trouble. 😼🎾🔥

title: 🎄 Sisters Holiday Kickoff! 🎄
intro: When do you like to put up your holiday decorations? 🎅✨ Mom usually waits until after Thanksgiving…but Honey Bear and Bootsie Belle weren’t having it this year. The girls were determined to start celebrating early, and nothing was going to stop them…not even Santa being left in pieces after last year’s holiday party! With a bit of teamwork (and a few dramatic eye-rolls from Bootsie), they managed to assemble the animatronic Santa and Reindeer. By the end, they were glowing with pride…as were the decorations. Looks like the holidays arrived early in Summerville this year! 😄🎄💡

title: 🌸🐾 Sisters Visit Mayberry! 🐾🌸
intro: Honey Bear and Bootsie packed their tiny suitcases and took a paws-down adorable vacation to Mount Airy, North Carolina, the real-life inspiration for Mayberry! From Floyd’s Barber Shop to the replica courthouse, Snappy Lunch, the Andy Griffith Museum, and even squad-car tours, this charming town celebrates everything Andy Griffith. The Sisters soaked in the small-town magic, friendly smiles, and timeless nostalgia that makes Mayberry feel like stepping into TV history. Summerville meets small-town purr-rfection! 🐶🐱

title: 🐾 Override Activated! 🐾 ✨
intro: Today’s adventure is a special tribute to one of Honey Bear’s all-time favorite games, Horizon Zero Dawn! When bedtime turns into a wild robo-creature showdown, you can bet Honey Bear is the Aloy of Summerville… brave, bold, and just hoping the override works! 😅 🐱 Meanwhile, Bootsie Belle stays grounded in reality, waking her sister from the dream before that mech monster pounces! Sisters look out for each other, even in post-apocalyptic sci-fi dream worlds. 💛🐶 Enjoy today’s episode, and may all your machines turn from red-eye to blue-eye. 😉

title: 🌸 Tai Chi for Pets! 🌸
intro: Today, Honey Bear and Bootsie Belle watched Dad practicing Tai Chi for Vets, a wonderful program that helps our Veterans find balance, calm, and strength. 🇺🇸✨ Inspired, the girls decided to try their own Tai Chi moves — from Floating Puppy Cloud Hands to Crouching Kitty Hidden Claws — ending in perfect harmony with their cozy Yin-Yang cuddle pose. 🐶🐱💕

title: 🎉 Peek-a-Boo! 👀🐾
intro: Some families play “Peek-a-Boo” with babies, while ours plays it with a Tuxedo Cat. Bootsie Belle has decided that every window-shaped opening in the house is her personal stage from chair backs to cat tree portals. If she can stick her head through it, she’s performing. Meanwhile, Honey Bear is dramatically convinced that Bootsie’s “surprise appearances” are stealing her spotlight. Our little diva yorkie is not amused! Sit back and enjoy today’s episode of playful chaos, sibling rivalry, and one cat who simply cannot resist a good window cameo!

title: 🎉 Go Fish with Spot the Bald Cat! 🐾🐟
intro: Sometimes even our furry (and not-so-furry!) friends need a moment to figure each other out. Honey Bear may bark first and ask questions later, but a little curiosity and a friendly visit can turn sidewalk stand-offs into brand-new friendships. Today the Sisters learn that—just like humans—animals understand each other best once they actually meet. And Spot the Bald Cat, well, he’s more interested in teaching them his favorite game: Go Fish! 😄

title: 🎣 Catch ’n Release! 🐟✨
intro: Dad just got back from a Heroes on the Water kayak trip, and word travels fast in their household. Honey Bear is all smiles, but Bootsie? She’s already seasoning her imaginary fish feast. Only one problem: Dad didn’t bring any fish home because he did Catch ’n Release. Cue confusion. Cue sass. Cue Bootsie demanding to know where her lunch went. And Dad? He’s convinced those fish are somewhere bragging about how they outsmarted him. This one’s a fun little lesson in conservation, Summerville style. 😸🐶💛

title: 🌈 Rainbow Row Renovators 🌈
intro: Honey Bear and Bootsie Belle take a stroll through Charleston’s iconic Rainbow Row…and let’s just say their imaginations ran wild again. Between fairy cottage theories, humidity-frizz drama, and one very questionable cardboard-box renovation, the Sisters prove that Summerville magic always finds a way. Grab your parasols and pixie dust, this one sparkles. 💖🐾

title: 🎉 Government Back Open 🐾
intro: Even big human shake-ups, like shutdowns, land a little differently in the paws of Honey Bear and Bootsie Belle. While folks worry about work and news, our furry duo is mostly tracking treats, naps, and whatever humans are stressed about today. Today’s comic takes a peek at the shutdown, from their completely adorable point of view.

title: ✨ Aurora Adventures! 🐾
intro: The “Northern Lights” have a way of making even the most grounded creatures look up. Honey Bear and Bootsie Belle tumble headfirst into the shimmering mystery of the “Aurora Borealis.” Their curiosity carries them far beyond Summerville’s porch…all the way to the traditions of the Alaskan Inuit tribes. As the night sky over Summerville lit up like a cosmic neon playground, Honey Bear and Bootsie Belle weren’t about to miss out. One curious duo’s glance turned into a full-on deep dive into the magic of the Aurora Borealis…with these two learning that the Northern Lights aren’t just pretty, they’re legendary! Funny enough, I first learned about this folklore not from a documentary, but rather from playing the game “Never Alone.” That game is a gem…crafted with the direct guidance of Inuit storytellers. Each chapter rewards you with interviews, insights, and cultural wisdom woven into the gameplay. You’re not just beating levels, you’re learning why certain stories matter, who they belonged to first, and how they still shape a people’s connection to the land and sky. It’s rare to find a game that teaches with such respect and heart, and that feeling spills perfectly into inspiration for this edition of the “Sisters of Summerville” comic. It’s mythology with movement…light with meaning…and exactly the kind of story Honey Bear can’t resist turning into a game of fetch. So buckle up for this adventure which is part science, part myth, and part the Sisters’ trademark chaos. And yes, Bootsie’s tail may never recover.

title: 🎣 Sisters Fly Tying! 🎣
intro: It was only a matter of time before Honey Bear and Bootsie Belle got their paws on Dad’s Norvise. His furry friends log into a Zoomie session with Project Healing Waters paw-deep in Semperfli materials, and declaring themselves professional fly tyers. Honey Bear’s calling the shots while Bootsie Belle claims she’s handling Fly Fishing quality control, which apparently means knocking spools off the table and judging everything with suspicious eyes. Before you could say “hackle feather,” they’d tied their very first Woolly Bugger together, and let’s just say, it’s got a touch of magic (and maybe some dog hair).

title: Veterans Day: The Sisters Salute You!
intro: Today, the Sisters of Summerville pause their playful adventures to honor those who have stood watch over our freedoms. From the first dawn patrols to the long marches home, every Veteran carries more than medals, they carry stories of courage, compassion, and sacrifice. Honey Bear and Bootsie Belle remind us that freedom’s song plays because brave hearts kept the beat. Whether in uniform or in memory, every hero deserves our deepest gratitude. To all who have served, and to those who continue to serve: Thank You! The Sisters of Summerville salute you with love, respect, and endless appreciation. ❤️🤍💙

title: 🐾 A Day @ All Is Well Pets! 🐾
intro: Honey Bear and Bootsie Belle hit Summerville’s favorite holistic pet shop for snacks, toys, and a “refreshing” spa experience. Let’s just say… one sister loved bath time, and the other reaffirmed her loyalty to self-grooming. 😹 Big thanks to All Is Well Pets for helping keep our furry friends happy, healthy, and squeaky clean (well, mostly)! 💦✨

title: 💛🌦️ Mostly Hugs - PTSD 🌦️💛
intro: Today’s episode touches on a more serious side of life — Post-Traumatic Stress Disorder (PTSD). Nearly 4% of people worldwide will face PTSD at some point in their lives. It can stem from many experiences — from the horrors of combat to personal trauma like assault or abuse. Honey Bear and Bootsie Belle remind us that storms don’t last forever. Healing begins when we reach out for help instead of hiding the pain. With the right mix of care, patience, friends, and family, those “stuck” thoughts can start to move again. Because sometimes…the best forecast really is “mostly hugs.” 💛

title: 🎸 Vault to Garage Band 🎶
intro: When the ghouls come shambling out of the wasteland, some folks reach for weapons, but not these two! Honey Bear and Bootsie Belle turn up the volume and face the apocalypse with rhythm, riffs, and radiant smiles. Armed with a homemade keytar and a cobbled-together guitar, the sisters discover that music really does soothe the savage beast…even when that beast is slightly radioactive. Because in Summerville’s post-apocalyptic future, the only thing stronger than the fallout is the funk! 💥🎵

title: 🌸 Flowertown in Wonderland 🌸
intro: Honey Bear and Bootsie Belle tumble headfirst into a Summerville twist on Lewis Carroll’s ‘Alice’s Adventures in Wonderland,” complete with a giant glass of Sweet Tea and a Queen who knows more than she lets on! It’s a reminder that sometimes the wildest adventures happen not just down the rabbit hole…but also between the pages of a good book. 📚✨ Even sisters can get lost in the same story…just in very different ways!

title: 🌍 Fantastic Two ✨
intro: After watching The Fantastic Four last night, Honey Bear and Bootsie Belle decided it was their turn to save the universe — Summerville style! When a mysterious black hole threatens Earth, our brave (and slightly overdramatic) duo suit up as The Fantastic Two! Honey Bear’s ready to clobber cosmic chaos, and Bootsie’s… mostly annoyed about it. Expect sizzling humor, fiery tempers, and a cosmic cameo from a silver surfer mouse. 🚀🔥🐭 Can the Sisters save the universe before snack time? Find out in today’s adventure of Sisters of Summerville! 💫

title: 🎵 Some will play, Some will chew 🎵
intro: Honey Bear and Bootsie Belle remind us that even when our hobbies go in Separate Ways, we can still end the day Worlds Together! A nod to one of the greatest bands of the ’80s—Journey—because who says a Yorkie and a tuxedo cat can’t find harmony between power chords and purrs?

title: 🎣 Gone Fishin’ at Colonial Lake! 🎣
intro: Inspired by the South Carolina Department of Natural Resources (SCDNR) Active Fishing Clinic in Charleston, this episode casts our favorite duo—Honey Bear and Bootsie Belle—into a day of learning the basics of knot tying, casting, and reeling in their first big catch! With Colonial Lake Park’s beautiful Charleston backdrop, the sisters discover that fishing takes patience, teamwork, and a good sense of humor… especially when the catch of the day turns out to be a catfish! 🐟 Special Note: It was really cool seeing a family catch fish during this event. There is just something so heartwarming about seeing a dad able to catch a big fish in front of his wife and kids. And then have them fish too. Such a great event that SCDNR provides to help the community learn about fishing and how important our fish and wildlife are to us all.

title: ⏰ The Daylight Savings Dilemma ⏰
intro: Daylight Savings Time may give humans an extra hour of sleep, but try explaining that to your pets! Honey Bear and Bootsie Belle’s internal clocks didn’t get the memo, and breakfast delays are not part of their morning routine. As folks across Summerville adjust to the time change, our furry sisters remind us that when it comes to feeding schedules… nature keeps its own time. 🐾😂

title: ✈️🐾 Learning to Fly 🐾✈️
intro: This is a nod to my favorite comedy about flying the friendly skies. Fasten your seatbelts and secure your chew toys, it’s turbulence ahead in Summerville Airspace! When Honey Bear decides she’s ready to conquer the skies after watching three YouTube tutorials, poor Bootsie Belle gets drafted as her co-pilot. Things go about as smoothly as a coffee service on flight 209. With the “Auto-Pawlot” at the controls (a smiling blow-up pilot who’s clearly seen better flights), the Sisters of Summerville soar, spin, and finally “land” in a nearby tree. Somewhere, Leslie Nielsen is proud. Sure, they didn’t stick the landing… but they did learn that in the skies—or in sisterhood—it’s all about staying pawsitive!

title: 🎶🐾 The Lassies Have Gone Highland! 🐾🎶
intro: The Sisters trade their sunny porch for the rolling hills of Scotland in this tartan-filled adventure! Honey Bear’s tossing the caber (sort of), and Bootsie Belle’s piping her wee heart out as the pair dance their paws off for a proper Scottish feast. Whether your clan colors run Fraser, MacKenzie, or just “whatever looks good in plaid,” this one’s for every Scot at heart — and every tartan lover who knows a good Highland fling when they see one. 👒🍀 “Dancing for Dinner!” celebrates heritage, humor, and the joy of friendship… all wrapped in the swirl of kilts, haggis, and laughter.

title: 🎃 The Treat Patrol: A Halloween Special 🎃
intro: As twilight settled over Summerville, Honey Bear and Bootsie Belle took up their official Halloween duty: guarding the candy bowl. With fangs polished and witch hat tilted just right, they swore to hand out treats “fairly”…but fairness is a fuzzy concept when one of you’s a cat with a sweet tooth. Soon, superheroes, zombies, and mini creepers overran the porch in search of sugar…and by the end of the night, the Sisters learned an important Halloween truth: it’s not about how much candy you give, but how much mischief you make in the process!

title: PAW WARS: Episode Treat
intro: The Sisters are blasting off in their cheesiest adventure yet: “The Paw Wars!” Episode Treat takes you to a galaxy where Princess Pawmé Amewdala faces off against her whiskered nemesis, Darth Bootsie Belle, and the lactose-loaded Death Swiss Star. This Cat ’n Dog show is a little cheesy, a lot punny, and entirely out of this world. May the paws be with you!

title: 🚀 Sisters: The Final Fur-tier 🐾
intro: When Honey Bear and Bootsie Belle accidentally beam aboard the U.S.S. Enterpaws, chaos is only logical! With Romousean ships closing in, the fearless Captain Honey Bear orders the crew to “Fire the biscuit blasters!” while Engineer Bootsie Belle struggles to keep her whiskers straight. But even across the galaxy, dinner waits for no one. Join the Sisters as they boldly go where no pet has gone before… and make it home just in time for kibble!

title: 🎃 Bootsie’s 1st Ride 🎃
intro: It’s spooky season in Pine Forest Country Club, and Honey Bear and Bootsie Belle are braving the neighborhood—one paw at a time! This week marked Bootsie’s first-ever stroller adventure, and let’s just say… she picked quite a night for it. 😹👻 From skeleton riders to cauldron-bubbling witches, every Halloween display you see in this comic is actually real—straight from the streets we walk. By the end of the trip, one thing was clear: Honey Bear’s courage only goes so far, and Bootsie’s next “walk” might just stay on four wheels!

title: ✨ Magic Gone Haywire! ✨
intro: 🎩 When Honey Bear the Magician decides to make her assistant Bootsie Belle “disappear,” things don’t quite go according to plan… resulting in one wildly unexpected twist that longtime cartoon fans might recognize as a nostalgic nod to a certain half-cat, half-dog duo from TV history. 🐾 Their fur might have merged, but the laughs are fully separated!

title: 🤠 Shootout @ High Noon 🤠
intro: The tension’s thicker than peanut butter at the Sisters’ Saloon! Sheriff Honey Bear is fixin’ to bring the notorious milk thief, Black Belle, to justice. But when these two cowgirls face off at high noon, their “weapons” aren’t exactly deadly… unless you count a squeaky bunny and a cat teaser! Looks like in this town, the only thing more dangerous than a duel… is sibling rivalry. 🐾💥

title: Going Back in Time!
intro: ⏳🐾 Today’s Sisters comicstrip proves that when imagination meets cardboard, anything can happen! Honey Bear and Bootsie Belle set out to visit ancient Rome…but let’s just say their “time machine” had a recipe twist. 🥗

title: Dance Off!
intro: 🕺 The Sisters are taking it to the dance floor! 🐾 Honey Bear might be off-beat, but she’s got heart, style, and pure tornado energy! Meanwhile, Bootsie Belle is all smooth grooves and feline finesse with that Freestyle Fusionist of funk! ✨ Who do YOU think should win this Dance Off? Vote for your favorite Sister in the comments below!

title: Sisters Park Adventure
intro: QUESTION: Where do you love to take your cats and dogs for some fun? I’m on the lookout for new places to take the real-life Honey Bear and Bootsie Belle for a few hours of adventure! 🐕🐈 😸 In today’s episode of “Sisters,” the girls are living it up at Ashley River Park…splashing in the water, zooming down slides, and making new little friends along the way. 🦋

title: 😼 AI NIGHT SCHOOL 😼
intro: Dad is going back to school to learn A.I. from Purdue University online. Only the Yorkie dog Honey Bear and tuxedo cat Bootsie Belle have their own ideas about what that means…🐾

title: 😼 BLANKETS! 😼
intro: They’re more than cozy covers in a cat’s world — they’re fortresses, secret lairs, and five-star hideouts. Bootsie Belle just wants some quiet “me time” in her blanket tent… until Honey Bear hears the magic word: “PLAY!” 🐾

title: FETCH!
intro: It isn’t just a game in our house—it’s a lifestyle. 🎾 From the moment Dad wakes up, Honey Bear is geared up for an all-day marathon of squeaky toy mayhem… while Bootsie Belle? Well, she’s got her own version of playtime. 😼🐾

title: 🐾 Angels & Demons 🐾
intro: Today’s “Sisters” comic feels perfectly timed for a Sunday. Honey Bear and Bootsie Belle have always taken turns playing the angel and the demon, but this time, they discover those roles can come in all shapes and sizes…even round robotic ones!

title: Happy Birthday, Brother!
intro: 🐾 This “Sisters of Summerville” comic is in honor of Big Brother, who is having a birthday today! And the girls have to make the day special for him with cake and presents. NOTE: When I first started this comic series, I thought to make the human characters secondary to focus more on the animals. But over time, I shifted the story as Humans are just as much a part of their lives as all the Pets are!

title: 🎣 Gone Fishing! 🎣
intro: This Saturday morning, I’ll be out kayak fishing at Murrells Inlet, South Carolina…so I’m dedicating this episode of the “Sisters” comic strip to Heroes on the on the Water, an amazing group that helps Veterans, First Responders, and their families find peace and connection through fishing. Let’s hope my little Yorkie, Honey Bear, and her partner-in-crime, Bootsie Belle the tuxedo cat, do a good job grilling up the day’s catch afterwards! 🐾🔥🐟

title: 🐾🎮 Sisters Survival Ascended 🎮🐾
intro: When Dad steps away from his ARK: Survival Ascended game, Honey Bear accidentally gets sucked into the world of ARK! Now it’s up to Bootsie Belle to figure out how to bring her sister back before the dinosaurs get her! 🦖

title: Rainy Days
intro: 🐾 Many of you may have pets affected by weather. Our yorkie Honey Bear starts shaking as soon as the barometric pressure changes. Meanwhile our tuxedo cat Bootsie Belle isn’t phased by a little water! We’ve tried all kinds of things from Thunder Shirts to Melatonin, but honestly the greatest cure is Time. 😅

title: Operation Clean Teeth
intro: When Dad mentioned he was headed to the dentist, Honey Bear and Bootsie Belle decided it was their turn for a cleaning! Let’s just say things got a little… foamy. 😅 And no worries, the “Sisters” author’s visit was just a routine cleaning at Solomon Family Dentistry in Summerville, SC!

title: Midnight Snack
intro: Some nights, the Sisters sneak out of bed after Mom and Dad fall asleep for a little “midnight snack.” 🍗 But with Honey Bear the Yorkie and Bootsie Belle the tuxedo cat, snack time usually turns into chaos — and someone always drops the ball… literally! 😹🐾

title: Finders Keepers Loosers Weepers!
intro: Even the best of “Sisters” have their playful moments of payback! While Honey Bear and Bootsie Belle truly adore each other, every now and then one just can’t resist getting the upper paw… as you’ll see in today’s comic strip!

title: 🎃 Sisters Halloween at Pine Forest! 🎃
intro: Happy haunting, everyone…and keep an eye out for that headless horseman. It neighs when you least expect it! While out trick-or-treating at the Pine Forest Country Club, our brave little witch yorkie “Honey Bear” and vampire tuxedo cat “Bootsie Belle” ran into the one that nobody wants to surprise after dark…the Headless Horseman! 🐴

title: 🐾 Laser Tag! 🎯
intro: When Yorkie Honey Bear found a shiny red laser pointer, she knew exactly what to do… have a little fun teasing her femme feline sister, Bootsie Belle! The tuxedo cat didn’t stand a chance once that mysterious red dot started dancing across the living room — and let’s just say, one sister enjoyed this game a little more than the other! 😸 ⚠️ Kid Tip: Laser pointers are for play, but never point them at anyone’s eyes…human or furry! 👀

title: Spa Day for Sisters
intro: Honey Bear’s big plan for today is to treat her feline sister Bootsie Belle to a luxurious bubble bath! But Bootsie Belle’s reaction is pure disbelief. Cats don’t do bubbles. One sister ends up soaked, while the other ends up smugly grooming herself like a queen…as both prove that self-care isn’t one size fits all.

title: Too Much of a Good Thing!
intro: Our tuxedo cat Bootsie Belle got into the catnip while our dog Honey Bear is fixated on her bone. I guess you really 'can get' too much of a good thing!

title: First Walk
intro: 🐾 TRUE STORY: Our tuxedo cat Bootsie Belle whimpered when our yorkie dog Honey Bear took her first walk. But once she realized they both get treats after walks, Bootsie was ready to push her sister out the door!

title: Stow-A-Ways Kayak Fishing
intro: 🎣 We paddle into a kayak fishing adventure as my wife and I have always joked about what it would be like if our yorkie Honey Bear and tuxedo cat Bootsie Belle came along when I hit the water. This time, I imagined them stowed away in my Calcutta fishing bag for a kayak fishing trip in my Bonafide kayak at Murrells Inlet, South Carolina — right where I’ll be fishing with Heroes On The Water - Lowcountry, SC Chapter.

title: Fetch
intro: 🐾 The game of “Fetch” is a daily tradition in our home… one that our dog Honey Bear would happily play from sunrise to sunset if she could! 🎾 Every morning starts the same…a wagging tail, a squeaky toy, and a very hopeful Yorkie ready to get Dad moving. Meanwhile, our cat Bootsie Belle just watches, clearly wondering why anyone would work that hard before breakfast.

title: Need a Little More Sleep!
intro: Here is a morning ritual our cat goes thru to get Mom to wake up early and spend some Mommy-Kitty time. Only her internal kitty clock wakes up way too early!

title: Treats for One?
intro: When Dad asks Who are my good little girls and only Honey Bear shows up, Bootsie Belle is left without any treats. If you snooze, you lose!

title: Indy 500
intro: We swear these two practiced on the Indy 500 race track before coming to us!  Well Honey Bear is from Indiana after all.

title: I Go first!
intro: Honey Bear insists that she goes first since she is the older, bigger sister.  Bootsie Belle should remind her, she's only one day older, but acts more like a kid!
